form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on March 29 over 600m at this track behind Super Special beaten 2 lengths (35.26) in a Restricted WIN. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (35.06) at this track over 600m. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th over 600m at this track beaten 12 lengths (35.45) behind Surrealist in a Grade 5 on April 2. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Into the 1st turn was severely checked and fell as a result.

form.formComment: Stepping out over 600m for the first time. Out of the placings in recent runs, most recently when eighth over 300m at Q Straight. Hasn't done enough of late to inspire confidence.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the winning post was checked and dragged down.

form.formComment: Is a 14 start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when third (30.13) over 520m at this track. Did run very good time last start. Tough field and looking to others.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (30.99) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4 length fifth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th in a Grade 6 on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Mighty Shazam beaten 7 lengths (26.05). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.
